name: Jimmy Gomez
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,399,391 for Jimmy Gomez in U.S. House, CA-34. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $3,399,391.
